reference: While I am resting and just about to doze off, I am awakened by this sinking feeling in my heart as if it is going to stop. When I purposely try to stay awake, the feeling goes away. What causes this? I am a heart patient recovering from stent surgery, and during the daytime, I am doing well. I am fairly active. I don't get this feeling all the time.
text: While. Testing and just about to doze off, I am awakened by this sinking feeling in my heart as if it is going to stop. When I purposely try to stay awake, the feeling goes away. What causes this? I am a heart patient recovering from stent surgery, and during the daytime I am doing well. I am fairly active. I don't get this feeling all the time.
